'''Traff''' was a [[Jeodu]] [[Gender/Legends|male]].

==Biography==
He was a member of [[Black Nebula (organization)|Black Nebula]], a personal guard for [[Dequc]] as of [[4 ABY/Legends|4.5 ABY]].

{{Char-stub}}
